links.title: 🟢  TORNA AL MONITORAGGIO LIVE
links.tooltip: Apri la dashboard in tempo reale

panels.description: Scostamento medio assoluto avanti/indietro nel periodo.

targets.query:
import "math"
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.abs(x: float(v: r._value))})) |> mean()

panels.title: Deviazione pitch media

panels.description: Scostamento medio assoluto laterale nel periodo.

targets.query:
import "math"
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.abs(x: float(v: r._value))})) |> mean()

panels.title: Deviazione roll media

panels.description: Massima deviazione assoluta del pitch rilevata nel periodo.

targets.query:
import "math"
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.abs(x: float(v: r._value))})) |> max()

panels.title: Deviazione pitch massima

panels.description: Massima deviazione assoluta del roll rilevata nel periodo.

targets.query:
import "math"
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.abs(x: float(v: r._value))})) |> max()

panels.title: Deviazione roll massima

panels.description: Numero di eventi di allerta attivi registrati nel periodo.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r._value == true) |> group(columns: []) |> count()

panels.title: Eventi di allerta

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Inclinazione avanti/indietro")

from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Inclinazione laterale")

panels.description: Alert dell'intervallo selezionato, ordinati e identificati per sessione di monitoraggio.

targets.query:
import "strings"
base = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}")
active = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active") |> rename(columns: {_value: "active"}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with session_id: if exists r.session_id then r.session_id else "legacy"})) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "session_id", "active"])
messages = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message") |> rename(columns: {_value: "message"}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with session_id: if exists r.session_id then r.session_id else "legacy"})) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "session_id", "message"])
join(tables: {active: active, messages: messages}, on: ["_time", "code", "severity", "session_id"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with session_name: if r.session_id == "legacy" then "Sessione precedente" else r.session_id, alert_name: if r.code == "POSTURE_MARKED_DEVIATION" then "Deviazione marcata" else if r.code == "POSTURE_PROLONGED_DEVIATION" then "Deviazione prolungata" else if r.code == "POSTURE_OK" then "Postura regolare" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_STALE" then "Flusso dati interrotto" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_RESTORED" then "Flusso dati ripristinato" else if r.code == "BATTERY_CRITICAL" then "Batteria critica" else if r.code == "BATTERY_LOW" then "Batteria bassa" else if r.code == "BATTERY_RECOVERED" then "Batteria ripristinata" else if r.code == "ACC_SEQUENCE_GAP" then "Pacchetti mancanti" else if r.code == "DATA_LOSS" then "Perdita dati maglia" else "Errore elaborazione", message: if strings.strlen(v: r.message) > 70 then strings.substring(v: r.message, start: 0, end: 70) + "…" else r.message})) |> keep(columns: ["session_name", "_time", "alert_name", "active", "message"]) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["session_name", "_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 100)

panels.title: Alert per sessione

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "posture", start: 0)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "posture", start: 0)
